name: Tapu Ka Style
desc: Tapu makes everyone happy with his thoughtful gifts. In the morning, Sonu decides to prepare a special breakfast for Tapu.

name: Tapu Brings Gifts
desc: Tapu brings special presents for all Gokuldham residents, and he decides to gift them in the middle of the night. Is Tapu planning another prank?

name: Tapu Ka Dhamakedar Surprise
desc: Tapu surprises everyone by coming back. Champaklal and Abdul say they helped Tapu in surprising everyone. Later, Tapu apologizes to everyone for scaring them.

name: The Prankster Returns
desc: The prankster appears before the society member and he turns out to be none other than a member of Gokuldham. Who could this prankster be?

name: Prankster Ki Shart
desc: Gokuldham residents are scared and confused as the lights go off in the clubhouse. Meanwhile, the prankster places a very strange condition in front of the society members.

name: Bhoot Ka Hungama
desc: Bhide, Popatlal and the others look for the ghost on the terrace. Meanwhile, Gokuldham residents find a speaker in the middle of the society compound.

name: Toofan Aa Gaya Hai
desc: The prankster writes a cryptic message on the society notice board. Gokuldham residents are scared and they think that a ghost is behind all of this. What will happen now?

name: Bhide Ka Shak
desc: Bhide begins to think that Goli is the one behind the prank. Will Bhide prove to be right this time?

name: Prankster Of Gokuldham
desc: Rest of the Gokuldham residents open their mystery boxes and find that they all have been pranked. However, Bhide has figured out who is behind this mischief. Will his hunch be correct?

name: Mystery Box In Gokuldham
desc: Gokuldham residents find mystery boxes outside their homes in the middle of the night. Who could be the one behind this prank?

name: Bagha's Ghost Story
desc: Jethalal gets angry when Bawri shows up at the shop to meet Bagha. Later, Bagha scares Jethalal with a ghost story.

name: Bagha Ki Laparvahi
desc: Bhide is curious about Tapu Sena's surprise gift. Meanwhile, Jethalal scolds Bagha for talking to Bawri during working hours.

name: Tapu Sena's Request
desc: Tapu Sena requests Bhide to buy new games for the society clubhouse. Will Bhide approve their request?

name: Jhoot Ka Jaal
desc: Bapuji explains how he managed to hide from Taarak's boss. Later, Taarak unboxes the gift his boss gave him.

name: Bade Guruji
desc: Taarak's boss sees Champaklal and says he wants to meet Bade Guruji. Everyone tries to stop him, but he doesn't listen.

name: Surprise Gift For Taarak
desc: Taarak's boss arrives at Gokuldham, and Taarak receives him at the society gate. Meanwhile, Jethalal and Sodhi look for him in the park.

name: Boss Ka Surprise
desc: Taarak's boss decides to pay Taarak a surprise visit in the morning. What will Taarak do now?

name: Bapuji Ki Jaadui Chhadi
desc: Taarak shares the good news with all the Gokuldham residents and tells them about Bapuji's brilliant idea. Meanwhile, Anjali prepares for the Europe trip.

name: Badey Guru Ji Ki Advice
desc: Taarak gives the presentation in front of the clients. However, the clients are not satisfied with his presentation. What will happen now?

name: Badey Guru Ji Ke Darshan
desc: Taarak arrives at the office, and his boss sees him in a green shirt. Will Bapuji's plan work out?

name: Taarak's Green Shirt
desc: Bapuji decides to go and talk to Taarak's boss. Later, when Taarak and Bapuji arrive at the office, everyone is shocked to see Taarak's green shirt.

name: Taarak Phas Gaya
desc: Taarak gets into an accident in the morning, which spoils his yellow shirt. Everyone blames Jethalal for putting Taarak in that situation. What will happen now?

name: Taarak Ka Luck
desc: Iyer lends his yellow shirt to Taarak, which fits him perfectly. Gokuldham residents wish him luck for the meeting. Will things go in Taarak's favour?

name: Taarak Ki Akhri Ummeed
desc: Taarak borrows Dr Hathi's yellow shirt, and Anjali helps him alter it. Will Taarak's problem finally get solved?

name: Yellow Shirt Ki Problem
desc: Taarak burns his yellow shirt while ironing it. He asks his fellow Gokuldham society members for their help.

name: Taarak Ki Good News
desc: Taarak calls Jethalal to his house to tell him some good news. What will the good news be?

name: Taarak Gives Anjali A Surprise
desc: Jethalal gets worried when Taarak does not answer his calls. Later, Taarak calls Anjali to give her a piece of good news.

name: Employee Aur Boss Ka Rishta
desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha ask Jethalal to increase their salary. Meanwhile, Taarak gets in trouble with his boss for trying to skip work.

name: Bawri's Surprise
desc: Madhavi tells Bhide that the neighbouring society has experienced some ghostly activities. Meanwhile, Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics to surprise Bagha.

name: Jethalal Ki Angoothi
desc: Jethalal loses his ring in the society compound. Will Bhide be able to help him find his ring?

name: 50 TV Ki Delivery
desc: Jethalal is worried that he has to deliver fifty TVs, but Bagha and Nattu Kaka are not picking up his calls. What will Jethalal do now?

name: Bawri Vapas Aa Gayi
desc: Bagha finally takes a sigh of relief when the real Bawri comes in front of him. However, Jethalal is still worried about completing the order on time.

name: Nashe Mein Bagha
desc: Bagha's drunk antics become a problem for the entire colony. Can a solution be found?

name: Bagha Ki Zidd
desc: Taarak and Anjali come up with a plan to get Bagha to step down from the balcony. Will their plan work?

name: Party Sharty Ka Nateeja
desc: Bagha creates a ruckus in the society, and no one is able to handle him. What will Gokuldham residents do now?

name: Bagha Ho Gaya Seedha
desc: Jethalal and the others find Bagha inside a bar, drinking away his sorrow. What will happen when Bagha drinks too much?

name: Bagha Bhaag Gaya
desc: Bagha runs away from home and is not picking up his phone. Meanwhile, Jethalal gets tensed about completing the order on time.

name: Badey Order Ki Tension
desc: Jethalal is anxious as he receives a large order, but Bagha is in no condition to work. Meanwhile, Jethalal seeks Taarak's help to find a solution to this problem.

name: Bagha Ki Tragic Love Story
desc: Bagha gets depressed when Bawri refuses to talk to him. Will Nattu Kaka and Jethalal be able to cheer up his mood?

name: Bagha Ka Toota Dil
desc: Bagha gets worried as Bawri gets late for their date. He goes to Bawri's house to check on her but finds that her house is locked.

name: Naye Saal Ki Khushkhabri
desc: Jethalal finds out that the profits of Gada Electronics have increased by fifty per cent over the past year. Meanwhile, Bagha rushes to meet Bawri, who has just returned from Kanpur.

name: Bharat Ki Pracheen Bhasha
desc: Jethalal tries to decipher the meaning behind the thought written in Sanskrit. Meanwhile, Bagha brings good news for Jethalal in the morning.

name: Naye Saal Ka Naya Suvichar
desc: Bhide kicks off the new year by writing the thought of the day in Sanskrit. However, many Gokuldham residents are puzzled by the meaning behind the thought. Who will be able to decipher its true meaning?

name: Gokuldham Welcomes The New Year
desc: Gokuldham residents come together to celebrate the New Year together. However, Taarak is worried that something might go wrong. Will Taarak's fears come true?

name: New Year Ki Party Ka Rang
desc: Tapu Sena takes Bhide's help to plan a party for New Year's Eve. They decide to let everyone draw chits with a random colour that they would have to wear at the party.

name: Year End Sale At Gada Electronics
desc: Bhide tells Jethalal and Bapuji about the events that transpired between Popatlal and Sudhakar Mama. Meanwhile, Bagha and Nattu Kaka come up with an innovative offer for increasing sales before the New Year.

name: Sonu Ke Special Guests
desc: Sonu prepares breakfast for the special guests that are coming to her house. Bhide and Madhavi are puzzled by the change in her behaviour. Who will the special guests be?

name: Unlucky Popatlal
desc: Popatlal proves to be unlucky once again, as he finds out that Vidya loves someone else. Meanwhile, Chalu Pandey is adamant about arresting Bhide, as per their deal.

name: The Eye Opener
desc: The tables seem to have turned as Sudhakar and Vidya thank Popatlal for opening their eyes. Will Popatlal's wish of getting married finally be fulfilled?

name: Sudhakar Mama Wants Popatlal
desc: Sudhakar Mama arrives at Gokuldham along with a group of people from his village. Will Bhide and the others hand over Popatlal to them?

name: Inspector Pandey's Celebration
desc: Inspector Pandey catches Popatlal and asks the rest of the members to back off. Will his celebration of catching the first criminal in Gokuldham Society last long?

name: Will Popatlal be Caught?
desc: Chalu Pandey and his canine look for Popatlal all over the colony. Can 009 find Popatlal's distinct smell and trace him?

name: Truth Revealed
desc: Everyone who helped Popatlal gets forced to reveal the truth in front of Bhide. Will Popatlal finally show his face?

name: Finding Popatlal
desc: Chalu Pandey reassures Bhide that they will find Popatlal in time. He thinks that Popatlal is hiding within the society compound and assigns a special agent to sniff him out.

name: Police Complaint Against Popatlal
desc: Gokuldham residents are shocked when they learn that Bhide has filed a police complaint against Popatlal. However, Popatlal is still nowhere to be found. What will happen now?

name: Bhide's Decision
desc: Chalu Pandey agrees to find Popatlal on the condition that Bhide will not take the case back under any circumstance. What will Bhide do now?

name: Sudhakar Mama Warns Gokuldham Society
desc: Sudhakar Mama arrives in Gokuldham society along with other people from his village to confront Bhide and Popatlal. Will Popatlal finally show his face?

name: Bhide Confronts
desc: Bhide is unable to find Popatlal and his friends tell him to leave the matter for now and confront him when he returns. What will happen next?

name: Bhide Suspects Everyone
desc: Bhide starts doubting everyone and thinks that they are helping Popatlal hide. Will someone slip up and reveal the truth?

name: Popatlal's Escape
desc: Taarak tries to lure Bhide away so that Popatlal can escape from the society. Will Popatlal find a safe place to hide?

name: Search For Popatlal
desc: Popatlal hides inside Taarak's house when Iyer refuses to help him. Meanwhile, Bhide looks everywhere around the society in search of Popatlal. What will happen when Popatlal finally catches up to him?

name: Popatlal Hides
desc: Popatlal sneaks into Iyer and Babita's house to escape Bhide's wrath. But how long will it be before Bhide catches him?

name: Bhide's Wrath
desc: Bhide is furious with Popatlal for his actions and chases him all around the colony. What will happen when Bhide finally gets his hands on him?

name: Angry Sudhakar
desc: Sudhakar is fuming with anger and decides to confront Bhide about Popatlal's actions. What will happen when Popatlal returns to Gokuldham?

name: Popatlal And Vidya
desc: Popatlal decides to meet Vidya at the school where she works as a teacher. Meanwhile, Gogi and Goli's parents begin to grow suspicious about their activities.

name: Shiv Ganga Village
desc: Popatlal, Gogi and Goli travel to Shiv Ganga village to meet Vidya and propose to her for marriage. Meanwhile, Bhide decides to apologise to Popatlal for his behaviour.

name: Finding Vidya's Address
desc: Popatlal takes help from Gogi and Goli to find Vidya's address and meet her in person. Will Popatlal's plan work?

name: The Suitable Groom
desc: Popatlal overhears Bhide's conversation and finds out that his uncle is looking for a suitable groom for his daughter. Will this be the opportunity to get married Popatlal was waiting for?

name: Disheartened Popatlal
desc: Popatlal gets disheartened when things don't work out for him at the marriage bureau. Later, he eavesdrops on Bhide talking to someone about looking for a potential groom. Will Popatlal finally get a match?

name: Gambhir Mudda
desc: Jethalal has to go to Daman for an important meeting, and he gives Bhide the responsibility of taking care of Bapuji. Meanwhile, Popatlal gets a call from the marriage bureau about a potential match.

name: Late For Work
desc: Jethalal's tension begins in the morning as Nattu Kaka and Bagha get late for work. However, the tension seemingly goes away as Jethalal receives an order for two hundred TVs.

name: Bhide's Search For Sakharam
desc: Bhide takes Taarak's help to look for Sakharam. Bhide thinks that Jethalal has played a prank on him by taking Sakharam away. Will his hunch prove to be true?

name: Sakharam Goes Missing
desc: Taarak tells everyone how he safely made it back home. Later, Bhide gets a shock as Sakharam goes missing from the society compound.

name: Efforts Gone In Vain?
desc: Despite all the efforts from Gokuldham residents, Taarak's boss finally finds his way inside Taarak's house. What will happen when he finds out the truth?

name: Tapu Sena's Distraction Plan
desc: Tapu Sena coaxes Taarak's boss to play cricket with them. Will they be able to buy Taarak enough time to return home?

name: Doctor Hathi To The Rescue
desc: Doctor Hathi stalls Taarak's boss and takes him to his home. Meanwhile, Taarak encounters even more problems while on his way to Gokuldham. Will Taarak's boss find out about his lie?

name: Bhide And Abdul's Plan
desc: Bhide and Abdul try to think of excuses to stop Taarak's boss from entering the society. Meanwhile, Taarak and Jethalal encounter a lot of problems while on their way home.

name: A Surprise For Taarak
desc: Taarak finds out that his boss is headed to his home to surprise him. Taarak rushes back before his boss finds out that he lied about his injury.

name: Taarak In A Mess
desc: Things get complicated for Taarak as his boss reaches Gada Electronics. Will his boss find out that Taarak lied to him about his injury?

name: International Client's Arrival
desc: Taarak arrives at Jethalal's shop, and all of them await the international client's arrival. Will the business deal go as planned?

name: Taarak's Lie
desc: Taarak decides to lie to his boss and help Jethalal instead of going to the office. Will Jethalal get into trouble because of this?

name: Office Se Chutti
desc: Taarak decides to make an excuse to dodge office work and attend the meeting with Jethalal. Will this plan work?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Important Task
desc: Jethalal decides to bring Taarak along with him for the meeting with the international client. However, Taarak refuses as he gets assigned an important task by his boss. What will Jethalal do now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – International Client
desc: Jethalal scolds Bagha when a customer complains about him. Later, an important client from abroad contacts Jethalal about a big contract.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Restaurant Pahuchne Mein Deri
desc: Problems keep piling up one after another, which causes a delay in the dinner plans. Can Tapu Sena and the others reach the restaurant in time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dinner With Bapuji
desc: Bapuji wants to go out for dinner with Tapu Sena, but Jethalal is worried about this plan. How will things pan out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena's Dinner Plan
desc: Tapu Sena decides to take Bapuji out for dinner. Will their dinner plan be successful?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Guru Nanak Ji Ki Anmol Seekh
desc: Sodhi and his family continue to celebrate Guru Nanak Jayanti and spread happiness among Gokuldham residents.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Guru Nanak Jayanti Ki Badhaiya
desc: Sodhi and his family celebrate Guru Nanak Jayanti with all Gokuldham residents. Meanwhile, Goli is scared as he spills chutney on Sakharam. What will Bhide do when he finds out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Cheque Ka Hungama
desc: Madhavi tells Bhide that she accidentally washed the kurta that the cheque was in. What will happen when Jethalal finds out about this?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki Tarkeeb
desc: Bhide agrees to accompany Jethalal and Taarak to the medical store. But he is unaware that it was all a trick to give him the maintenance cheque. What will Bhide do when he finds out the truth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ka Sabak
desc: Jethalal apologises to Bhide for not submitting the maintenance cheque on time. However, Bhide is adamant that if Jethalal doesn't pay the penalty, he will resign from the secretary post.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ke Cheques
desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka request Jethalal to sign some cheques. Later, Babita shows up at Jethalal's shop with some of her friends.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki Penalty
desc: Jethalal lies to Bapuji about giving the maintenance cheque. However, Bhide arrives at Jethalal's house and his lie comes out in front of everyone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Ki Treat
desc: Bapuji treats Tapu Sena with pizzas to reward them for saving the Diwali celebrations. Meanwhile, Bhide decides to penalize Jethalal if he doesn't pay the maintenance cheque on time.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Ki Diwali
desc: After the painting job gets completed, all Gokuldham residents celebrate Diwali together. The next day, Huma Qureshi and Sonakshi Sinha arrive at Gokuldham to meet Dr Hathi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Saving Diwali
desc: Bhide is ready to face everyone's anger when the painting job gets delayed. However, he gets a surprise once he steps out of his house.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bad News For Bhide
desc: The contractor gives Bhide the bad news and tells him that the painting job won't get finished on time. What will Bhide do now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Diwali Ki Excitement
desc: Gokuldham residents are excited to celebrate Diwali in the newly painted society. But will the contractor be able to complete the work on time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Ka Sabse Bada Darr
desc: The painting job in Gokuldham begins in full zest. However, Bhide is anxious about things going wrong. Will all of his worries come true?
